summary: NT Commerce 12.0 Iteration 67 - Major refactoring testing. Products, Customers, Sales, Purchases routes extracted from monolithic server.py into separate route files. Backend: 25/25 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All pages load correctly including SmartNotificationsPage (route added in this iteration).

minor.issue: Console shows 500 error when fetching cash box on POS page - existing issue, not related to route extraction

critical_code_review_comments: Route extraction successful - Products, Customers, Sales, Purchases routes working correctly from new route files

Products routes tested: GET /api/products, GET /api/products/paginated, GET /api/products/quick-search, GET /api/products/generate-barcode, GET /api/products/generate-sku, GET /api/products/generate-article-code, GET /api/products/alerts/low-stock, POST /api/products - ALL PASS
Customers routes tested: GET /api/customers, GET /api/customers/paginated, GET /api/customers/generate-code, POST /api/customers - ALL PASS
Sales routes tested: GET /api/sales, GET /api/sales/paginated, GET /api/sales/generate-code, POST /api/sales - ALL PASS
Purchases routes tested: GET /api/purchases, GET /api/purchases/generate-code - ALL PASS
SmartNotificationsPage route now correctly defined at /smart-notifications in App.js (line 565-570)
SmartNotifications sidebar link present in Layout.js (line 364)
Regression tests passed: Repairs, Defective Goods, Backup, Wallet, Permissions APIs all working
Note: compatible_models field in ProductCreate must be a list not string - documented for API consumers
seed_data_creation: Created test product and customer during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major refactoring complete. Products/Customers/Sales/Purchases routes now extracted into /app/backend/routes/{products,customers,sales,purchases}_routes.py. These routes are registered BEFORE the legacy api_router in server.py (lines 11805-11812), so they take precedence. The old code remains in server.py as backup. SmartNotificationsPage now accessible at /smart-notifications. All extracted routes use factory pattern: create_xxx_routes(db, get_current_user, get_tenant_admin, require_tenant).

products_routes.GET /api/products/paginated: PASS - Returns paginated products with total/page/page_size/total_pages
products_routes.GET /api/products/quick-search: PASS - Returns search results with total count
products_routes.GET /api/products/generate-barcode?artic: PASS - Deterministic barcode from article code
products_routes.GET /api/products/generate-sku: PASS - Generates SKU with SG- prefix

sales_routes.GET /api/sales: PASS - Returns sales list sorted by created_at desc
sales_routes.POST /api/sales: PASS - Creates sale with items (requires unit_price field)

frontend_pages./smart-notifications: PASS - SmartNotificationsPage route added and working

api_schema_notes.ProductCreate.compatible_models: Must be a list of strings, not a comma-separated string
api_schema_notes.SaleCreate.items[].unit_price: Required field - must be included in sale items
